items_all.title_en: Sources: Zhipu is considering a multibillion-dollar Hong Kong share sale after its stock surged 2,000% since its January IPO, pushing its market cap above $128B (Dong Cao/Bloomberg)
items_all.title_zh: 資料來源：自 1 月 IPO 以來，智浦股價飆升 2,000%，推動其市值超過 128B 美元，之後該公司正在考慮在香港出售價值數十億美元的股票（曹東/彭博社）

items_all.title: Customer engagement service MoEngage acquires Aampe, whose AI agents help brands personalize messaging, for "tens of millions", per a source; Aampe raised ~$28M (Jagmeet Singh/TechCrunch)
items_all.title_original: Customer engagement service MoEngage acquires Aampe, whose AI agents help brands personalize messaging, for "tens of millions", per a source; Aampe raised ~$28M (Jagmeet Singh/TechCrunch)
items_all.title_en: Customer engagement service MoEngage acquires Aampe, whose AI agents help brands personalize messaging, for "tens of millions", per a source; Aampe raised ~$28M (Jagmeet Singh/TechCrunch)
items_all.title_zh: 消息人士透露，客戶互動服務 MoEngage 收購了 Aampe，後者的人工智慧代理商幫助品牌個人化訊息傳遞，價值「數千萬」； Aampe 籌集了約 2,800 萬美元（Jagmeet Singh/TechCrunch）

items_all.title: Sources: prices for Nvidia's AI chips on China's black market have more than doubled amid a US export crackdown; its flagship DGX B300 server has risen to $1.1M (Eleanor Olcott/Financial Times)
items_all.title_original: Sources: prices for Nvidia's AI chips on China's black market have more than doubled amid a US export crackdown; its flagship DGX B300 server has risen to $1.1M (Eleanor Olcott/Financial Times)
items_all.title_en: Sources: prices for Nvidia's AI chips on China's black market have more than doubled amid a US export crackdown; its flagship DGX B300 server has risen to $1.1M (Eleanor Olcott/Financial Times)
items_all.title_zh: 資料來源：在美國出口管制的影響下，中國黑市上英偉達人工智慧晶片的價格上漲了一倍多；其旗艦 DGX B300 伺服器已漲至 110 萬美元（Eleanor Olcott/金融時報）
items_all.title_bilingual: 資料來源：在美國出口管制的影響下，中國黑市上英偉達人工智慧晶片的價格上漲了一倍多；其旗艦 DGX B300 伺服器已漲至 110 萬美元（Eleanor Olcott/金融時報） / Sources: prices for Nvidia's AI chips on China's black market have more than doubled amid a US export crackdown; its flagship DGX B300 server has risen to $1.1M (Eleanor Olcott/Financial Times)

items_all.title_original: Cerebras reports Q1 revenue up 94% YoY to $193.4M, net loss down 41% to $14M, and forecasts core gross margin to shrink in Q2; CBRS drops 8%+ after hours (Jordan Novet/CNBC)
items_all.title_en: Cerebras reports Q1 revenue up 94% YoY to $193.4M, net loss down 41% to $14M, and forecasts core gross margin to shrink in Q2; CBRS drops 8%+ after hours (Jordan Novet/CNBC)
items_all.title_zh: Cerebras 報告第一季營收年增 94% 至 1.934 億美元，淨虧損下降 41% 至 1,400 萬美元，並預測第二季核心毛利率將萎縮； CBRS 盤後下跌 8% 以上（Jordan Novet/CNBC）

items_all.title: Market intelligence company Klue confirms it has suffered a breach, for which cybercrime group Icarus takes credit; Jamf, HackerOne, and others are affected (Zack Whittaker/TechCrunch)
items_all.title_original: Market intelligence company Klue confirms it has suffered a breach, for which cybercrime group Icarus takes credit; Jamf, HackerOne, and others are affected (Zack Whittaker/TechCrunch)

items_all.title: Walmart acquires Paris-based Vibe.co, which lets businesses create and run targeted ads on streaming services; Vibe.co's co-founders will join Walmart Connect (Brian Steinberg/Variety)

items_all.title_zh: 沃爾瑪收購了總部位於巴黎的 Vibe.co，該公司允許企業在串流媒體服務上創建和投放有針對性的廣告； Vibe.co 的聯合創始人將加入 Walmart Connect（Brian Steinberg/Variety）

items_all.title_original: ByteDance unveils Seedance 2.5, saying the AI video model can generate up to 30-second clips from up to 50 reference materials, up from 12 for Seedance 2.0 (Juro Osawa/The Information)
items_all.title_en: ByteDance unveils Seedance 2.5, saying the AI video model can generate up to 30-second clips from up to 50 reference materials, up from 12 for Seedance 2.0 (Juro Osawa/The Information)
items_all.title_zh: 位元組跳動推出 Seedance 2.5，表示人工智慧視訊模型可以從多達 50 個參考資料產生長達 30 秒的剪輯，而 Seedance 2.0 則為 12 個（Juro Osawa/The Information）

items_all.title: The EU will apply a €3 duty on items under €150 from July 1, as the bloc seeks to slow the flood of low-priced merchandise from retailers like Shein and Temu (Brendan Murray/Bloomberg)
items_all.title_original: The EU will apply a €3 duty on items under €150 from July 1, as the bloc seeks to slow the flood of low-priced merchandise from retailers like Shein and Temu (Brendan Murray/Bloomberg)
items_all.title_en: The EU will apply a €3 duty on items under €150 from July 1, as the bloc seeks to slow the flood of low-priced merchandise from retailers like Shein and Temu (Brendan Murray/Bloomberg)
items_all.title_zh: 歐盟將從 7 月 1 日起對 150 歐元以下的商品徵收 3 歐元的關稅，以減緩 Shein 和 Temu 等零售商的低價商品氾濫（Brendan Murray/Bloomberg）
items_all.title_bilingual: 歐盟將從 7 月 1 日起對 150 歐元以下的商品徵收 3 歐元的關稅，以減緩 Shein 和 Temu 等零售商的低價商品氾濫（Brendan Murray/Bloomberg） / The EU will apply a €3 duty on items under €150 from July 1, as the bloc seeks to slow the flood of low-priced merchandise from retailers like Shein and Temu (Brendan Murray/Bloomberg)

items_all.title_en: The EU is set to impose a €3 duty on non-EU items under €150 from July 1, as the bloc seeks to slow the flood of low-priced merchandise from retailers like Temu (Brendan Murray/Bloomberg)
items_all.title_zh: 歐盟將從 7 月 1 日起對 150 歐元以下的非歐盟商品徵收 3 歐元的關稅，以減緩 Temu 等零售商的低價商品氾濫（Brendan Murray/彭博社）
items_all.title_bilingual: 歐盟將從 7 月 1 日起對 150 歐元以下的非歐盟商品徵收 3 歐元的關稅，以減緩 Temu 等零售商的低價商品氾濫（Brendan Murray/彭博社） / The EU is set to impose a €3 duty on non-EU items under €150 from July 1, as the bloc seeks to slow the flood of low-priced merchandise from retailers like Temu (Brendan Murray/Bloomberg)
